subcodes.first_line: The Promise hath come to pass, and this, verily, is the Promised One. The earth hath told her tidings, and the mountains have passed away, while the people remain [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتی الوعد و هذا لهو الموعود قد حدثت الارض اخبارها و مرت الجبال و الناس هم
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action, @apocalyptic imagery, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @suffering and imprisonment
